title: Early-game balance and readability pass
summary: Evaluate and tune M7 early-game pressure and readability using M5 alpha content evidence and M6 product-gate constraints without rewriting core systems.
acceptance: Records early resource pressure, night-risk cadence, event frequency, failure recovery and player-understanding risks for M7 external testing
Uses existing M5 alpha content framework evidence and deterministic scenarios where possible
Updates balance/readability data or docs only inside reviewed scope and keeps structured reasons for failures visible
Does not weaken deterministic hashes, benchmark thresholds, save/replay gates or product-gate verdicts
Produces a verified balance/readability package that downstream public-material and known-issues tasks can cite

history.details: Created by WM-0098 M7 planning DAG; remains proposed until WM-0098 is verified, integrated and done.

Added M7 early-game balance/readability package; recorded resource pressure, night cadence, event frequency, recovery windows, structured failure readability, player-understanding risks, missing source-doc path note and downstream citation guidance; no runtime/content/hash/baseline/save/product-gate/release/M8 changes; required checks passed.

verified: No blocking findings. Verified docs-only balance/readability package cites M5 evidence and current M5 rerun hashes 0xfba70a5c/0x9ba83cb7; records missing docs/01_design/03_player_experience.md honestly; preserves Web demo-only, Windows controlled-test, save/replay, benchmark, product-gate, release and M8 boundaries. Checks: taskctl validate/status, git diff --check, corepack pnpm test --filter m5-invariants, corepack pnpm sim:run seed 5 100000 ticks.

Integrated verified M7 early-game balance/readability package after independent reviewer confirmed docs-only scope, M5 evidence/hashes, missing source-path disclosure, downstream citations and no runtime/content/hash/baseline/save/product-gate/release/M8 work. Integration gates passed: validate-handoff, taskctl validate/status, git diff --check and pnpm quality.

objective: Make early M7 external-test play readable and recoverable while preserving deterministic M5 evidence.
forbiddenPaths: apps/** unless documenting readability evidence only
platform save or Worker protocol changes
benchmark baseline updates without reviewer-approved evidence
telemetry accounts paid services crash upload or public feedback system
public release upload store submission signing installer or updater
M8 task creation, promotion, claim, implementation or review
risksAndFileOwnership: Risk: balance edits can accidentally move protected M5 hashes; any change must be intentional, reviewed and documented.
Risk: readability work can become broad content expansion; stay focused on M7 external-test comprehension.
File ownership is limited to balance/readability docs, content data or focused tests explicitly needed for this pass.
ownerGate: Block if M5 final hash migration is needed and no owner/reviewer-approved migration plan exists
Block if changes require core-system rewrites, public protocol changes or M8 content volume
Block on public release, store, signing, telemetry, accounts, paid services or final public save promises
m0M6RegressionCoverage: Run M5 invariants and 100000-tick M5 scenario
Preserve benchmark thresholds of 10 percent warning and 20 percent blocking regression
Preserve M6 Web demo-only and Windows controlled-external-test verdicts
benchmarkImpact: No threshold weakening. If balance work affects runtime cost, run pnpm bench and document any movement against the 10/20 percent policy.
reviewRouting: gameplay-designer completes to reviewer; reviewer verifies deterministic evidence, scope and downstream-citable balance/readability conclusions.
rollbackModel: Revert balance/readability docs, data and tests from WM-0100; leave M7 planning and other tasks intact.

sparkEligibility.reason: Gameplay balance and readability decisions affect milestone readiness and protected regression evidence.

review.summary: No blocking findings. Verified docs-only balance/readability package cites M5 evidence and current M5 rerun hashes 0xfba70a5c/0x9ba83cb7; records missing docs/01_design/03_player_experience.md honestly; preserves Web demo-only, Windows controlled-test, save/replay, benchmark, product-gate, release and M8 boundaries. Checks: taskctl validate/status, git diff --check, corepack pnpm test --filter m5-invariants, corepack pnpm sim:run seed 5 100000 ticks.

integration.summary: Integrated verified M7 early-game balance/readability package after independent reviewer confirmed docs-only scope, M5 evidence/hashes, missing source-path disclosure, downstream citations and no runtime/content/hash/baseline/save/product-gate/release/M8 work. Integration gates passed: validate-handoff, taskctl validate/status, git diff --check and pnpm quality.
